name: YEVHENII DIACHENKO
summary:
A highly resourceful, innovative, and competent PHP/JS/SuiteScript developer with extensive knowledge of the development of web applications, using JS and PHP programming language.
Experienced in developing extensions and having the enthusiasm and ambition to complete projects to the highest standard.
Looking for a suitable developer position with an ambitious & exciting company.

education.degree: Popov Odessa National Academy of Telecommunications
Popov Odessa National Academy of Telecommunications

workExperience.description:
Responsibilities:
 Led development and maintenance of NetSuite Bundles and SuiteApps using SuiteScript 1.0/2.1, JavaScript, TypeScript, AngularJS, and Preact 
Designed scalable ERP/CRM customizations and internal tooling within the Oracle NetSuite ecosystem
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to improve engineering workflows, delivery speed, and development efficiency
Solved complex production and customer issues, including debugging high-impact ERP and business logic problems
Mentored developers across multiple teams, providing technical guidance, code reviews, and architecture recommendations
Modernized legacy solutions by refactoring outdated implementations and improving maintainability and performance
Rewrote and improved technical documentation, simplifying onboarding and long-term project support
Participated in architectural decisions and contributed to engineering best practices and coding standards
Worked in fast-paced enterprise environments with multiple parallel projects and stakeholder requirements

Responsibilities:
 Developed ERP/CRM customizations and integrations for Oracle NetSuite and Verenia products
Built and maintained Verenia Bundles and customer-specific business solutions using JavaScript
Converted detailed business and functional requirements into scalable production-ready implementations
Managed multiple projects simultaneously in a fast-paced client-focused environment
Collaborated closely with technical and customer-facing teams to improve delivery efficiency and product quality
Redesigned and optimized legacy implementations to improve maintainability and performance
Supported troubleshooting, debugging, and enhancement of existing enterprise systems

Responsibilities: 
Correct errors by making appropriate changes and rechecking the program to ensure that the desired results are produced.
Perform or direct revision, repair, or expansion of existing programs to increase operating efficiency or adapt to new requirements.
 Write, update, and maintain computer programs or software packages to handle specific jobs such as tracking, storing or retrieving data
Connection of payment systems.
Creation of admin panel.
